title: Unable to restore archived portfolio items
excerpt: Here is a wild one. When you archive an item from the porfolio, its gone forever. There is no way to restore the item and all your updates and column values are lost forever. I cant be the only person to have realized th…

posts.author: Workiflow (Keenan)
posts.cookedHtml: Here is a wild one. When you archive an item from the porfolio, its gone forever. There is no way to restore the item and all your updates and column values are lost forever. I cant be the only person to have realized this.
